notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Oneil Cruz reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Pedro Ramírez.

notableEvents.label: Nico Hoerner pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Nico Hoerner grounds out to first baseman Spencer Horwitz.

notableEvents.label: Seiya Suzuki pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Seiya Suzuki challenged (pitch result), call on the field was confirmed: Seiya Suzuki called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: Carson Kelly pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Carson Kelly grounds out, second baseman Brandon Lowe to first baseman Spencer Horwitz.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Throwing error by pitcher Ben Brown on the pickoff attempt.

notableEvents.label: Jhostynxon Garcia GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jhostynxon Garcia grounds into a double play, shortstop Dansby Swanson to second baseman Pedro Ramírez to first baseman Michael Busch. Konnor Griffin out at 2nd. Jhostynxon Garcia out at 1st.
